Front: Problem: Group Anagrams (Medium) | Link: https://neetcode.io/problems/anagram-groups | Trigger: group strings by anagram class
Back: Pattern: Hash map by 26-char signature tuple. Aha: same frequency vector means same anagram group. Logic: for each word build 26-count array with +=1, use tuple as key, append word to bucket. Edge cases: empty string, single item, repeated letters. Complexity: O(n*m) time, O(n*m) space.
